title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: look. All the mirrors to the ship are breaking.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because the ship sunk, the mirrors are probably breaking due to the water pressure! Ahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i need to talk to you. Get away from the others.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That candy guy said that the sunny sank!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We thought we were gonna sink, too! But jinbe did some- thing crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy! We broke all the mirrors on board!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, no enemies can come bother us here,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you won't be able to get back, either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No you won't! You don't even have any plans, do you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji's making the cake on cacao Island right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're heading over there to meet up with him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should meet up with him in 10 hours at the earliest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Understand? After you beat up that guy, find a mirror that can take you to cacao Island!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
